notes: Valid LEVEL frames arrive every 100 ms while the controller can still be stepped every 50 ms.
Treat CONTROLLER_INPUT_NONE as an idle/no-new-frame step. Only fail safe after malformed input, explicit timeout input, or more than 1000 ms without a valid sensor frame.

task.objective: Keep the tank in the safe band with a simple bang-bang controller and fail safe to pump-off on bad input.
policy: On boot, keep the pump off.
If 30 <= LEVEL <= 80, hold the previous safe actuator state.
On malformed sensor input, command PUMP OFF.
On explicit sensor timeout, command PUMP OFF.
If no valid sensor frame arrives for more than 1000 ms, command PUMP OFF.

constraints: Keep the existing controller public interface intact.
Pump commands must always be ACT PUMP ON or ACT PUMP OFF.
Level values are expected to stay within 0..100.
Any malformed or stale sensor input must drive the controller to the safe OFF state.
Internal helper names and code organization are not graded; only the required public behavior and runtime behavior are.
